ethernetPort.err_feature_not_supported: Feature not supported. No matching port on this device or secondwan restricted.
ethernetPort.err_port_invalid_or_unsupported: Port not supported or invalid name.
ethernetPort.err_vlan_param_invalid: VLAN parameter validation failed. Please check VLAN mode, PVID or allowed VLANs.
ethernetPort.err_wan_vlan_dualwan_conflict: WAN VLAN conflicts with dual WAN configuration.
ethernetPort.err_wan_port_limit_exceeded: Maximum number of WAN ports has been reached.
ethernetPort.err_port_cannot_switch_to_wan: This port cannot be switched to WAN.
ethernetPort.err_unplug_cable_before_switch_lan: Please unplug the cable before switching to LAN.
ethernetPort.err_secondwan_already_exists: secondwan already exists. This port cannot be configured as secondwan.
ethernetPort.err_tap_s2s_mode_enabled: TAP-S2S mode is enabled. This feature is not available.
ethernetPort.max_wan_reached: Only 2 WAN ports are allowed. Please switch another port to LAN first.
ethernetPort.port_mode_tip_wan: The WAN port connects to your Internet modem or upstream network.
ethernetPort.port_mode_tip_lan: The LAN port connects to local devices or downstream switches.
ethernetPort.vlan_mode_tips: Standard mode allows only one VLAN (Untagged), used for connecting end devices. Multiple VLANs mode allows multiple VLANs (Tagged) on one port, typically for connecting APs or other switches.
ethernetPort.network_assignment_tips: PVID is the default network for untagged traffic. Traffic from untagged devices will be assigned to this network.
ethernetPort.err_interface_in_lan_mode: When switching from WAN to LAN, the network cable needs to be unplugged.
